pages.title: My Friends
pages.text: .youlian a:link,a:visited { display:block; border-radius: 15px; /*边框为圆角*/ border-width: inherit; border-color:#000000; /*边框颜色*/ min-width:20px; min-height: inherit; font-weight:bold; color:#000000; background-color:#CAD9DF; text-align:center; padding:15px; text-decoration:none; text-transform:uppercase; } .youlian a:hover,a:active { background-color:#00a1d6; transition: background-color .4s linear; color:#FFFFFF; } 友链添加 名称 misaka21描述 喜欢就坚持吧链接 blog.misaka.best头像 e.sukeycz.com/images/2019/08/16/0.jpg 友链申请请发送到我的邮箱喵~

posts.title: ChinaJoy2019
posts.text: 没错我又来水(测试)博客了(逃 8月2号和@Rory Chou去了上海chinajoy 拖延症晚期的我现在才发… 人超级多，走的超级累 没买到手持云台,这次视频就从B站上找找把.. 不多说了还是看视频吧…

posts.title: Hello World
posts.text: Welcome to Hexo! This is your very first post. Check documentation for more info. If you get any problems when using Hexo, you can find the answer in troubleshooting or you can ask me on GitHub. Quick StartCreate a new post1$ hexo new "My New Post" More info: Writing Run server1$ hexo server More info: Server Generate static files1$ hexo generate More info: Generating Deploy to remote sites1$ hexo deploy More info: Deployment
